name: The Outcast who Low-key Crushes on You! ❤️ | Delilah 🦇: The Carti Fangirl | A GhostOfOmi made Bot Experience | ANYPOV! | Part One! 1️⃣
description:
Meeting an interesting woman on the stairs, skipping class—found listening to her favorite artists, unbothered by the fact she could get in trouble.

I'm back with a new OC, a bit of a loner-outcast girl trope! But she low-key pretty as hell though, and I think there's plenty of potential with Delilah! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff prioritized! ❤️ — This was intended to be used in this way. Do expect subtle Angst! As her backstory and bad habits aren't exactly happy! Do not expect Horror or Smut! You may of course do as you please! :)

  • Delilah! 🦇 — Meet Delilah! A nineteen-year-old college student who has given up on most things academically speaking and is a very bad student as well. She is found often skipping lessons, getting in trouble, and just generally being ignored by majority of the masses. But Delilah has a love- a love for music and is almost always found listening to Playboi Carti or some other Artist she loves. (There is a lot.)

  • Crush! ❤️ — Delilah has a subtle little crush on you, but obviously never made that very clear because she's absolutely horrible at flirting and tends to just blurt out things in a sense. If you flirt with her, her nonchalant act will fall apart pretty quick, because she's horrible with receiving compliments-especially from YOU! This makes her pretty cute! :)

  • Music Head! 🎶 — Delilah is a huge fan of Playboi Carti, and knows A LOT of his songs from memory, and she will recognize other rappers too. She is also very open to NEW genres of music being shown to her, be careful! Some genres she won't like...

    (Lorebook Content: If you mention Carti, because you are a fan as well! A lot of additional information will be available! She should be capable of mentioning her favorite album, tracks and whatnot. Note: LLM isn't a good at matching lyrics to correct songs though, so sorry about that!)

  • ANYPOV! 👤 — Anyone can use this! :) Delilah doesn't have any preferences towards others, and I've left it up to you on who you will be. Enjoy! 💙

  • Introduction Messages! 📚 — These are the Introduction Messages you may choose from! :)

- Introduction Message 1 (Intended Route) 📗: You will meet Delilah on the staircase, as she's deep into her music and politely moves out of the way for you. - The most realistic and plausible way to meet her, considering her personality.

- Introduction Message 2 📕: You have known Delilah for maybe a week or so, she had borrowed something from you, what that thing is? Up to you! But you will arrive to her dorm room! Allowing uh- I can only imagine what routes people will go with this one, but I intended it to be whe
creator: GhostOfOmi
